data.title: DocumentBadge: full house-accent border on hover (drop /40 softening)

data.body:
Scope expanded to two related changes to the same component (one PR, two commits):
(1) HOVER: DocumentBadge's hover border hover:border-house-publications-deep/40 -> hover:[border-color:var(--accent,currentColor)] — full house-accent on hover (emphasis tier), dropping the /40 softening the user never noticed. Lab page sets --accent = house-publications-deep (#C44878), same pink the card's icons already use, so color is unchanged — only opacity goes 40% -> 100%.
(2) RENAME: 'Badge' misleads (it's a full card, and is literally the model for TalkCard). Rename DocumentBadge -> DocumentCard: file DocumentBadge.tsx -> DocumentCard.tsx, component + DocumentBadgeProps -> DocumentCardProps + header comment, DocumentGrid.tsx import + 3 usages, StoryPage.tsx:118 comment. No test refs; DocumentCard is collision-free.
Acceptance: grep DocumentBadge src/ -> 0; typecheck/build/conformance pass; tests at FRAC-199 baseline (7), no new.

REVIEW PASS (reviewed cold against plan task_01KV9VGGYDKCH7FGQM5SWXG9ZS).

Diff: exactly 2 commits (8d5986b hover, 3f22859 rename). Source changes are clean and minimal:
- DocumentCard.tsx detected by git as a 94%-similarity RENAME of DocumentBadge.tsx (--find-renames confirms). Only DocumentBadge->DocumentCard, DocumentBadgeProps->DocumentCardProps, header comment, and the one hover line changed inside it.
- Hover line is exactly 'hover:[border-color:var(--accent,currentColor)]'. Resting border stays 'border border-foreground-faint'; focus ring stays 'focus-visible:ring-foreground'. No other styling touched (scale/shadow/accent-bar unchanged).
- DocumentGrid.tsx: import './DocumentCard' + all 3 <DocumentCard document=... className='h-full'> usages updated; props unchanged.
- StoryPage.tsx:118 comment updated.

grep -rn 'DocumentBadge' src/ -> 0 matches (no stragglers in filenames, symbols, props, imports, JSX, or comments).

Accent scope verified: LabPage.tsx sets style --accent: var(--color-house-publications-deep) on the <main> (line 18), which wraps DocumentGrid (line 81). So the hover border resolves via CSS cascade to the publications-deep pink (#C44878) -- NOT the currentColor fallback. Color unchanged from prior /40 variant; only the 40%->full-opacity softening is dropped, exactly as the user wanted.

Suite: pnpm typecheck PASS, pnpm build PASS, pnpm conformance PASS, pnpm test = 7 failed / 148 passed = FRAC-199 baseline (all 7 in buttons/footer/navigation/neighborhood; none touch lab/DocumentCard). No new failures.

Meets all acceptance criteria. -> done.
